prompt:
Ultra-realistic iPhone mirror selfie inside a sleek, dimly lit modern elevator, with the subject’s facial identity matching exactly the provided reference image. Full-body framing captured through the mirror, slightly wide perspective without distortion. The young woman stands at a subtle angle facing left, her head turned into a clean, defined side profile, lips gently pursed.

She holds her phone at chest level in her right hand, elbow slightly flared outward in a natural pose. In her left hand, she loosely carries an open paperback book resting against a deep burgundy skirt. Her hair is styled in a neat, slick low ponytail. She wears thin, transparent eyeglasses and white wired earbuds, with the cable draping down across her torso.

Outfit includes an oversized dark charcoal coat with broad sleeves layered over a grey hoodie and a black graphic sweatshirt. Accessories include chunky silver rings and a black quilted shoulder bag hanging from her left shoulder.

Environment details: dark matte elevator walls, stainless steel doors behind her, illuminated rectangular ceiling panels, vertical side light strips, and a control panel with buttons on the right wall. A metal mirror rail runs along the lower edge.

Lighting is cool and realistic, with accurate reflections, visible natural skin texture, and no beauty filters or smoothing effects. Clean, authentic iPhone mirror aesthetic.
